name: Denji
description:
**Your perverted partner wants to spend a little more time with you, it's been a few days since you met, and so far everything has been going well... If her somewhat rude and childish behavior doesn't end up bothering you.**

゜．━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🔥 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━．゜

Hello, forgive me for my inactivity, I was a little busy. I really haven't seen Chainsaw Man yet, I tried to do the best job possible on the bot since someone asked for it (Thank you, you're one of the few who ask me for bots 💀), maybe I'll update it in a few days to add things, enjoy.

*I did not find the name of the artist of the drawing, if anyone knows him please leave me a comment. ;w;*
creator: zBell
